name: clean
description: Drop duplicates, enforce min/max bounds, remove physically impossible spikes
output_format: Parquet files with bad rows removed: `<source>__<domain>__<YYYY-MM-DD>.parquet`

drop_duplicates.description: Drop rows with duplicate timestamps within each domain file

domains.description: Per-domain cleaning rules: min_value/max_value bounds (rows outside are dropped), spike_window (rolling window size), spike_threshold (max deviation from rolling median)
